description_long: This is a large, rectangular green dumpster with a domed black plastic lid featuring three raised sections. The body is made of metal, showing signs of rust, scratches, and weathering, indicating prolonged outdoor use. On each short end, there is a prominent metal handle mechanism, likely for lifting or maneuvering, with one side featuring a circular attachment point. The dumpster sits on four black caster wheels, allowing for mobility on flat surfaces. The lid appears to be a single, hinged piece, designed to be lifted from the front. The overall construction is robust, suitable for containing large volumes of waste in urban environments.
description: A weathered green metal dumpster with a domed black lid, metal handles on each end, and four caster wheels for mobility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved green metal face, a large metal handle mechanism, and part of the domed black lid.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a flat green metal panel with rust patches and the full width of the domed black lid.
description_view_2: Opposite end view with a similar handle mechanism and a circular attachment, mirroring the front but with subtle differences in wear.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the length of the green metal body, rust streaks, and the four caster wheels beneath.
attribute_lid_type: domed, single-piece, hinged plastic lid with three raised sections; no visible locking mechanism
attribute_handle_design: Two large metal bar handles, one on each short end, vertically mounted and attached to the body
